steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At an intersection point, both equations have the same $y$-value:
$$x^2+17x+4=x+4$$

steps.title: Solve for possible inputs
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor:
$$x^2+16x=0$$
$$x(x+16)=0$$
So the possible $x$-values are $x=0$ and $x=-16$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two equations and read the intersection whose $x$-coordinate is listed among the choices. The answer is A.
